sentences.target: Ich warte im Korridor vor dem Büro.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə ɪm ˈkɔʁidoːɐ̯ fɔʁ deːm byˈʁoː/

translations.de: Ich warte im Korridor vor dem Büro.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə ɪm ˈkɔʁidoːɐ̯ fɔʁ deːm byˈʁoː/
translations.en: I'm waiting in the hallway outside the office.
translations.es: Estoy esperando en el pasillo frente a la oficina.
translations.fr: J'attends dans le couloir devant le bureau.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在办公室外的走廊里等着。
translations.yue: 我喺辦公室外面嘅走廊度等緊。
translations.ru: Я жду в коридоре у офиса.
translations.pt: Estou esperando no corredor em frente ao escritório.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi ở hành lang bên ngoài văn phòng.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر في الممر خارج المكتب.
translations.nl: Ik wacht in de gang buiten het kantoor.
translations.uk: Я чекаю в коридорі біля офісу.
translations.hi: मैं दफ़्तर के बाहर वाले गलियारे में इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Περιμένω στον διάδρομο έξω από το γραφείο.
translations.nb: Jeg venter i korridoren utenfor kontoret.
translations.id: Aku menunggu di lorong di luar kantor.
translations.sv: Jag väntar i korridoren utanför kontoret.
translations.ro: Aștept pe coridor în fața biroului.
translations.da: Jeg venter i gangen uden for kontoret.
translations.ja: オフィスの外の廊下で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; intransitive predicate expressing the action.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); governs dative for static location; introduces the locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as object of the preposition 'im' indicating location.
Preposition selecting dative in a static, locative sense; introduces a secondary locative complement.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner for 'Büro' as complement of 'vor'.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'vor'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder rennen durch den Korridor nach draußen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈʁɛnən dʊʁç deːn ˈkɔʁidoːɐ̯ naːx ˈdʁaʊ̯sən/

translations.de: Die Kinder rennen durch den Korridor nach draußen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈʁɛnən dʊʁç deːn ˈkɔʁidoːɐ̯ naːx ˈdʁaʊ̯sən/
translations.en: The kids are running through the hallway to go outside.
translations.es: Los niños corren por el pasillo para salir.
translations.fr: Les enfants courent dans le couloir pour sortir.
translations.it: I bambini corrono lungo il corridoio per uscire.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们跑过走廊到外面去。
translations.yue: 啲細路沿住走廊跑出外面。
translations.ru: Дети бегут по коридору на улицу.
translations.pt: As crianças correm pelo corredor para sair.
translations.he: הילדים רצים במסדרון כדי לצאת החוצה.
translations.tr: Çocuklar dışarı çıkmak için koridordan koşuyor.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ chạy dọc hành lang để ra ngoài.
translations.ar: الأطفال يركضون في الممر ليخرجوا إلى الخارج.
translations.nl: De kinderen rennen door de gang naar buiten.
translations.hu: A gyerekek a folyosón futnak kifelé.
translations.hi: बच्चे बाहर जाने के लिए गलियारे में दौड़ रहे हैं।
translations.el: Τα παιδιά τρέχουν στον διάδρομο για να βγουν έξω.
translations.nb: Barna løper gjennom korridoren for å komme seg ut.
translations.id: Anak-anak berlari melalui lorong untuk keluar.
translations.sv: Barnen springer genom korridoren för att gå ut.
translations.ro: Copiii aleargă pe coridor ca să iasă afară.
translations.da: Børnene løber gennem gangen for at komme ud.
translations.ja: 子どもたちが廊下を走って外に出ていきます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner for 'Kinder' as subject.
Common noun, plural; nominative subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person plural; motion verb describing the action of the subject.
Preposition selecting accusative; marks a path traversed.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for 'Korridor' as object of 'durch'.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as complement of 'durch'.
Preposition used directionally with an adverbial complement; here forms a directional phrase with 'draußen'.
Directional adverb; complements 'nach' to indicate movement to the outside.

sentences.target: Im Korridor riecht es nach frischer Farbe.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈkɔʁidoːɐ̯ ʁiːçt ɛs naːx ˈfʁɪʃɐ ˈfaʁbə/

translations.de: Im Korridor riecht es nach frischer Farbe.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈkɔʁidoːɐ̯ ʁiːçt ɛs naːx ˈfʁɪʃɐ ˈfaʁbə/
translations.en: It smells like fresh paint in the hallway.
translations.es: En el pasillo huele a pintura fresca.
translations.fr: Dans le couloir ça sent la peinture fraîche.
translations.it: Nel corridoio si sente odore di vernice fresca.
translations.zh-Hans: 走廊里有股新油漆的味道。
translations.pt: No corredor cheira a tinta fresca.
translations.he: במסדרון יש ריח של צבע טרי.
translations.vi: Trong hành lang có mùi sơn mới.
translations.ar: تفوح في الممر رائحة طلاء جديد.
translations.nl: In de gang ruikt het naar verse verf.
translations.hi: गलियारे में ताज़ा पेंट की गंध आ रही है।
translations.nb: Det lukter fersk maling i korridoren.
translations.id: Di lorong tercium bau cat baru.
translations.sv: Det luktar ny färg i korridoren.
translations.ro: Pe coridor miroase a vopsea proaspătă.
translations.cs: Na chodbě je cítit čerstvá barva.
translations.da: Det lugter af frisk maling i gangen.
translations.ja: 廊下に新しいペンキのにおいがします。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition ('in dem'); governs dative for static location; introduces the setting.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the complement of 'Im'.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; used impersonal with expletive 'es'.
Personal pronoun, neuter; expletive/impersonal subject placeholder with 'riecht'.
Preposition selecting dative; with 'riechen' indicates what something smells of/like.
Attributive adjective, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Farbe' under 'nach'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'nach'.

sentences.target: Der Korridor ist heute total voll.

translations.de: Der Korridor ist heute total voll.
translations.en: The hallway is really crowded today.
translations.es: El pasillo está muy concurrido hoy.
translations.it: Oggi il corridoio è davvero affollato.
translations.pt: O corredor está bem cheio hoje.
translations.vi: Hôm nay hành lang rất đông.
translations.nl: De gang is vandaag erg druk.
translations.hi: आज गलियारे में बहुत भीड़ है।
translations.pl: Dziś na korytarzu jest bardzo tłoczno.
translations.el: Σήμερα ο διάδρομος είναι γεμάτος κόσμο.
translations.nb: Det er skikkelig fullt i korridoren i dag.
translations.sv: Det är jättemycket folk i korridoren i dag.
translations.cs: Dnes je na chodbě opravdu plno.
translations.da: Der er virkelig mange mennesker i gangen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は廊下がすごく混んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner marking the subject 'Korridor'.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular as sentence subject.
Finite auxiliary functioning as copula, present tense, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause, indicating the time frame.
Degree/Intensifier adverb; modifies the predicate adjective 'voll'.
Predicative adjective; subject complement in a copular construction with 'ist'.
